calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Irving 888 LLC is present. Represented by Ywai Si Chong.
Attorney Dolores Chong appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Adam Powala is present.
Attorney Louise Christine representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-02-2012 is vacated.
